parameters.query: UPDATE contractors c SET consecutive_non_response_count = consecutive_non_response_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() FROM lead_assignments la WHERE la.contractor_id = c.id AND la.notification_sent_at IS NOT NULL AND la.contractor_accepted_at IS NULL AND la.outcome IS NULL AND la.assigned_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '60 minutes' AND la.assigned_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' RETURNING c.id, c.business_name, c.consecutive_non_response_count;

UPDATE contractors SET status='paused', updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=$1; INSERT INTO contractor_events (contractor_id, event_type, event_data, triggered_by) VALUES ($1, 'non_response_flag', jsonb_build_object('count', $2::int), 'n8n');

parameters.subject: =⚠ Contractor paused for non-response: {{ $json.business_name }}
parameters.text: ={{ $json.business_name }} hit 3 consecutive non-accepts and has been paused. Routing is suspended for them. In-flight leads should be re-routed to backup contractors. Review at https://hivequote.com/admin/contractors
